Tissue paper with heart print foil design.
Functional for a variety of purposes, wrap loved one's gifts for a heart-warming surprise. Use to fill scrap books or for any arts and craft purpose.
The pearlescent metallic finish creates an eye-catching effect ideal for decorative purposes such as filling gift bags, or wrapping wine bottles.
